holes.content: Memanto costs $0.50/day for 10K memory operations vs. $2.32/day for Mem0-Graph and $1.70/day for Zep. Moorcheh's serverless architecture allows scaling to zero during idle periods.
holes.label: claim_cost_comparison

holes.content: Hindsight (hybrid system) achieves slightly higher overall accuracy (91.4% LONGMEMEVAL, 89.6% LOCOMO) but with maximum architectural complexity score 4/4, requiring dynamic multi-query retrieval and structured reflection passes.
holes.label: claim_hindsight_slightly_higher

holes.content: Memanto incurs zero LLM invocations and <10ms latency per write. Mem0-Graph and Zep require ≥2 LLM calls per write with 2-3s ingestion latency.
holes.label: claim_ingestion_zero_vs_hybrid

holes.content: The Information Theoretic Score (ITS) on a normalized [0,1] scale enables deterministic, threshold-based retrieval, eliminating the need for index construction and ensuring instant write-to-search availability.
holes.label: claim_its_threshold_deterministic

holes.content: Hybrid memory systems require ≥2 LLM calls per memory write for entity extraction and graph construction, resulting in approximately 2-3 seconds of ingestion latency per write.
holes.label: claim_llm_ingestion_overhead

holes.content: Memanto achieves sub-90ms retrieval with a single query. Multi-query and recursive strategies in hybrid systems lead to multi-second round-trip latencies.
holes.label: claim_retrieval_latency_comparison

holes.content: Stage 2 (recall expansion): Memanto achieves 82.8% on LOCOMO (+6.6 pp).
holes.label: claim_stage2_locomo

holes.content: Stage 2 (recall expansion, k=40, threshold=0.10): Memanto achieves 77.0% on LONGMEMEVAL (+20.4 pp), the largest single improvement.
holes.label: claim_stage2_longmem

holes.content: Stage 3 (prompt optimization): 82.9% on LOCOMO (+0.1 pp), negligible gain.
holes.label: claim_stage3_locomo

holes.content: Stage 3 (prompt optimization): 79.2% on LONGMEMEVAL (+2.2 pp), marginal gain.
holes.label: claim_stage3_longmem

holes.content: Stage 5 (Gemini 3 inference model): 87.1% on LOCOMO (+0.8 pp from Stage 4).
holes.label: claim_stage5_locomo

holes.content: Stage 5 (Gemini 3 inference model): 89.8% on LONGMEMEVAL (+4.8 pp from Stage 4).
holes.label: claim_stage5_longmem
